title: Input schema of the Podcast-to-Text Dataset Scraper

startUrls.title: Podcast URLs
startUrls.description: URLs of podcast websites or RSS feeds with transcriptions.

maxEpisodesToScrape.title: Max Episodes to Scrape
maxEpisodesToScrape.description: Maximum number of podcast episodes to process.

podcastCategories.title: Podcast Categories/Industries
podcastCategories.description: Filter by podcast category (Technology, Finance, Healthcare, etc.)

includeMetadata.title: Include Episode Metadata
includeMetadata.description: Extract title, date, speakers, duration, description.

extractTimestamps.title: Extract Timestamps
extractTimestamps.description: Preserve timestamp markers for each speaker turn.

extractSpeakers.title: Extract Speaker Information
extractSpeakers.description: Identify and track different speakers in conversation.

extractKeyPhrases.title: Extract Key Phrases
extractKeyPhrases.description: Auto-detect key topics and phrases discussed.

extractQuotes.title: Extract Memorable Quotes
extractQuotes.description: Find and extract notable quotes from episodes.

cleanTranscription.title: Clean Transcription Text
cleanTranscription.description: Remove filler words (um, uh, like) and normalize text.

includeAudio.title: Include Audio Metadata
includeAudio.description: Extract audio URL, duration, quality info.

minTranscriptionLength.title: Min Transcription Length (words)
minTranscriptionLength.description: Skip episodes with transcriptions shorter than this.

dateRange.title: Date Range (recent X days)
dateRange.description: Only scrape episodes from last X days (0 = all).
